Patch Set 7: Code-Review-1

When an attribute is declared as an output, the check box is marked as selected and greyed out in the attributes tab indicating that it is already declare as an output and preventing it from being declared again as an output.
However, when the service is then exported/imported the checkbox is un-checked and available to selected.

Similarly in the outputs tab, in the service when an attribute is declared as an output, the output is shown eith a delete icon allowing the user to delete the output again. However, when the service is exported/imported the output is displatyed, but the delete icon is not
